occupation: Head of Media at Active International UK
headline: Head of Media at Active International
summary:
I graduated from Keele University in 2007 with a BA in English and History and moved to London to pursue a career in Media.

My first job was at Titan Outdoor where I stayed for two years, first as a Sales Planner and then as an Account Manager. In Jan 2010 I went to work for JCDecaux where I learnt to utilise a wide spectrum of OOH environments and formats to construct detailed and innovative responses to briefs and sales pitches. In August 2010, I joined the media specialist Posterscope as a Client Manager, with the main role of planning and buying media space.

I have worked in the media industry for the past 18 years, during this time I have gained invaluable experience in selling, buying and planning media within the OOH environment across a variety of clients.

I am now Head of Media at Active International UK, working across both broadcast and non-broadcast mediums to ensure that our clients and partners realise maximum value from their assets.

experiences.title: Client Manager
experiences.description: I joined Posterscope in August 2010 as a Client Manager. During my time at Posterscope i was responsible for managing and growing client accounts across Omnicom agencies, fostering new business and establish strong ongoing client relationships. I endevoured to educate clients on the benefits of outdoor advertising with potential campaign integration (Interactive and Mobile) and monitored/optimized targeted campaigns to ensure success rates. I continued to maintain exceptional client, agency and media owner relationships throughout my time at Posterscope and ensured that i indentified and created e new and innovative advertising opportunities within Outdoor to offer greater stand out for clients and maximize take up.

experiences.title: Business Development Manager
experiences.description: I joined JCDecaux as a Business Development Manager in January 2010. My responsibilities included maintaining exceptional client communications and account management across Posterscope and their corresponding media agencies. I utilised a wide spectrum of OOH environments and formats to construct detailed and innovative responses to briefs and and developed strategic and innovative ideas to present to clients with the aim of maximizing outdoor advertising revenue.

experiences.title: Account Manager
experiences.description: I worked at Titan Outdoor from September 2007 to January 2010. During this time i was responsible for providing account management to Posterscope and their corresponding media agencies. I developed strategic and innovative ideas to present to clients with the aim of maximizing outdoor advertising revenue whilst working effectively to meet and exceed quarterly sales targets, This was achieved by build strong relationships with all of my clients.
